ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the cluster was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the term (e.g., biological process, molecular function) */,
  "ontology_source" TEXT /* Source of the ontology (e.g., GO, KEGG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_terms" (
  "cluster_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster-term relationship */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "p_val" REAL /* p-value of the enrichment test */,
  "q_val" REAL /* q-value of the enrichment test */,
  "bg_size" INTEGER /* Background size (number of genes in the genome) */,
  "term_size" INTEGER /* Term size (number of genes in the term) */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Cluster size (number of genes in the cluster) */,
  "term_in_cluster" INTEGER /* Number of terms in the cluster */,
  "enrichment_ratio" REAL /* Enrichment ratio (ratio of term size to background size) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_terms_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_genes" (
  "cluster_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster-gene relationship */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_genes_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_genes" (
  "term_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term-gene relationship */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code for the term-gene relationship (e.g., IDA, NAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_genes_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_clusters" (
  "project_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-cluster relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_clusters_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_clusters_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_terms" (
  "project_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-term relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_terms_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, network, scatter plot) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization the comment belongs to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
